name: Auto-suggest fixes — broken/fixed code blocks with Copy Fix button
description: After a PR review is generated, an 'Auto-suggested Fixes' section appears below the review cards showing side-by-side broken and fixed code blocks. Each suggestion has a Copy Fix button that changes to 'Copied ✓' on click.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input and click 'Analyze PR'
Wait for the review report to fully load
A section titled '🔧 Auto-suggested Fixes' is visible below the review cards

Either at least one suggestion card is visible (showing broken and fixed code blocks side by side with issue title in red), OR the section shows '✅ No fixes needed — code looks clean!' if no suggestions were returned
If suggestion cards are present: a 'Copy Fix' button is visible on at least one card
If a 'Copy Fix' button is visible, click it
If clicked, the button text changes to 'Copied ✓'
If suggestion cards are present: an explanation text is visible below the code blocks (starting with 💡)
